Change 1: Replace:
  # Group triples by subject
      from collections import defaultdict
      groups = defaultdict(list)
      for t in triples:
          groups[t.subject].append(t)
  
      sentences = []
      for subj, items in groups.items():
          parts = [phrase(subj, t.predicate, t.object) for t in items]
          # Join parts with commas and a final conjunction
          if len(parts) == 1:
              sent = parts[0]
          else:
              sent = ", ".join(parts[:-1]) + ", and " + parts[-1]
          sentences.append(sent)
  
      # Combine subject sentences
      return " Also, ".join(sentences) + "."
with:
  # Build structured information for missions and astronauts
      from collections import defaultdict
  
      mission_info = defaultdict(lambda: {"crew": []})
      astronaut_info = defaultdict(list)
  
      for t in triples:
          pred_key = t.predicate.lower().replace(" ", "")
          if pred_key == "mission":
              # astronaut -> mission (crew member)
              mission = t.object
              mission_info[mission]["crew"].append(t.subject)
              astronaut_info[t.subject].append(t)
          elif pred_key in ("operator", "commander", "backuppilot"):
              mission = t.subject
              info = mission_info[mission]
              if pred_key == "operator":
                  info["operator"] = t.object
              elif pred_key == "commander":
                  info["commander"] = t.object
              elif pred_key == "backuppilot":
                  info["backupPilot"] = t.object
          elif pred_key == "crewmembers":
              mission = t.subject
              mission_info[mission]["crew"].append(t.object)
          else:
              astronaut_info[t.subject].append(t)
  
      sentences = []
